{{Infobox concept
| name = Gold
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Gold Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|In the context of sacred artistry, Gold represents the final stage of a practitioner's [[Path]]. Achieving this level requires a qualitative leap beyond [[Jade]], accomplished by harvesting a [[Remnant]] and [[binding]] it to the artist's physical body. This process transforms the practitioner into something more than mortal, as their bodies become partially composed of [[madra]]. Practitioners at this stage are often identified by a unique physical manifestation known as a [[Goldsign]], which serves to indicate their specific [[Path]]. The [[Gold stage]] is subdivided into three distinct levels: [[Lowgold]], [[Highgold]], and [[Truegold]]. Each subsequent advancement is significantly more difficult to achieve than the last, with the gap between stages being ten times wider than previous transitions. While [[Truegold]] is a formidable level of power, it is considered the beginning of true mastery, as further advancement toward realms like [[Underlord]] requires surpassing common sense and moving from the earth to the heavens. In some societies, those who have not reached Gold are viewed as powerless and unworthy of being called [[sacred artists]].}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Gold represents the ultimate stage of any [[sacred artist]]'s [[Path]]. Those who reach this level have mastered the secrets of [[madra]] to a degree that surpasses mortal dreams, resulting in bodies that are partially composed of the substance itself. Achieving this state requires a final step where an artist harvests a [[Remnant]] and binds it to their physical form. Although it is a pinnacle of power, Gold is a level that can eventually be exceeded.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Gold]] is the final stage of any [[sacred artist]]’s [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[Gold]] is someone who has mastered the secrets of [[madra]] beyond mortal dreams.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Gold]] bodies are partially made of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Gold]] is a level of power that can be exceeded.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The final step into [[Gold]] is harvesting a [[Remnant]] and [[binding]] it to the physical body.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gold represents a level of martial artist advancement that sits higher than the [[Copper stage]]. Achieving this rank requires an individual to hold a [[Remnant]] within their core and receive a [[Goldsign]], a process that triggers physical changes in the practitioner. This stage of progression serves as a measure of spirit and body strength for both martial artists and [[sacred artists]]. [[Yerin]] has successfully crossed the threshold to this status, a rank also held by [[Tash]]. While [[Yerin]] currently holds this position, she would find it impressive if [[Lindon]] were to reach the [[Gold stage]] in the future.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|At the [[Gold stage]], one holds a [[Remnant]] in their core and receives a [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Gold]] is a rank or status held by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Gold]] is a stage of progression for artists that causes physical changes.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Gold]] is a stage of advancement.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Gold]] refers to a level of martial artist.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Gold]] is a stage or rank for [[sacred artists]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] has crossed the threshold to [[Gold stage]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c10">''Soulsmith'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Gold]] is a stage of spirit/body strength.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Gold]] is a rank or status held by [[Tash]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Gold]] is a stage of advancement higher than [[Copper]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] would find it impressive if [[Lindon]] hit [[Gold]] someday.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Gold]] is a standard of power or rank.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|When [[Lindon]] is ready to break through to [[Gold]], [[Orthos]] can help him bridge the gap.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Gold]] is a stage or rank held by the young man on the ground.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The people of [[Sacred Valley]] believe [[Adama]] is a [[Gold]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Gold]] is a level of power/stage.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Advancing to [[Gold]] requires a trial involving a [[library]] in the city.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] was a [[Gold]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The vast majority of souls in [[Sacred Valley]] are [[Gold]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
